summary: Comprehensive testing of Spotify Artist Dashboard completed. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully including login/register, artist dashboard, fan browse, and admin panel.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Auth uses httpOnly cookies correctly for security
Brute force protection implemented with 5 attempt lockout
Role-based access control properly enforced on all protected endpoints
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds admin, artist, and fan users on startup. Artist has 5 demo songs (3 published with analytics, 1 pending, 1 uploaded).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend uses FastAPI with MongoDB. Frontend uses React with framer-motion animations. Auth uses httpOnly cookies. Test data prefixed with TEST_ for easy cleanup.

features_tested.login_page: PASS - Loads correctly, all form elements present, login works for all roles
features_tested.register_page: PASS - Loads correctly, fan/artist registration works, proper role selection
features_tested.artist_dashboard: PASS - Stats cards, songs table, analytics chart, upload modal all working
features_tested.upload_song: PASS - Modal opens, form submits, song appears in list with UPLOADED status
features_tested.submit_for_approval: PASS - Submit button changes song status to PENDING_APPROVAL
features_tested.fan_browse: PASS - Shows published songs, play/like buttons work, search filters correctly
features_tested.admin_panel: PASS - Shows pending songs and unverified artists, approve/reject/verify buttons present
features_tested.navigation: PASS - Sidebar tabs switch content correctly
features_tested.logout: PASS - Clears session and redirects to login
